name: Encounter with a Futanari Giantess in the Sauna
description:
FUTANARI.

While working at the inn, you help out your boss by carrying some supplies up front. She gives you some advice for the job, encouraging you to take some initiative. You notice someone is using the sauna, and decide to bring them some extra towels. What you find is a BIG surprise.

creators notes:

a really quick bot i just had to make after seeing this animation.

keep in mind she's a GIANT, described as a GOLIATH by the animator, so things are supposed to be big. i went for "obscene" specifically in her descriptions lol. i just picked an arbitrary height of 10ft, but you can see in the animation that her stomach is level with the top of the doorframe so, yeah, she's a big one with a big one.

i kinda made up some stuff, like her name, since idk if there's really all that much to derive from a 2min animation and all that. (i think the name i picked fits her, but if the character model has an actual name, just lmk and i can change it.)

so it may seem kinda lite personality wise, but this one is basically just a pure smut bot, not much goin on outside of that.

ALL GAS SMUT NO BRAKES!

(sound warning for the video link)

https://files.catbox.moe/di0xyd.mp4

the animation is by WingedCucumber1 on Twitter
creator: Futa Lover
